app.name: Claude Code Rust
app.one_liner: A native Rust terminal interface for Claude Code that replaces the stock Node.js/React Ink TUI with a high-performance Ratatui-based alternative while preserving full compatibility via a local Agent SDK bridge.

screens.name: Main Chat Interface
screens.purpose: Display conversation history, AI responses, tool outputs, and draft edits with inline image badges and live git branch context in the footer.

screens.name: Settings Panel
screens.purpose: Manage folder-local configuration such as 1M context enablement and view status of local overrides.

rust_commands.name: paste_clipboard
rust_commands.purpose: Handle clipboard paste events, including image data, converting images to PNG blocks and rendering inline [Image #N] badges.

rust_commands.name: resume_session
rust_commands.purpose: Launch the app in resume mode to pick from recent project sessions via a dedicated startup picker.

rust_commands.name: send_message
rust_commands.purpose: Transmit user input to the Claude Agent SDK bridge and render streaming responses in the TUI.

rust_commands.name: toggle_1m_context
rust_commands.purpose: Persist CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_1M_CONTEXT setting in .claude/settings.local.json and update UI status accordingly.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add basic input handling and command parsing
week 1: Implement core Ratatui rendering loop with message history
week 1: Integrate with local Agent SDK bridge over IPC
week 1: Support file editing and tool call display
acceptance_tests: App starts in under 100ms and uses less than 50MB memory on idle.
Enabling 1M context via /1m-context enable persists setting to .claude/settings.local.json and affects subsequent runs.
Footer displays current git branch and updates live when HEAD changes during app runtime.
Pasting an image with Ctrl+V inserts a renumbered [Image #N] badge in the draft and sends valid PNG block to API.
User can suspend the app with Ctrl-Z and resume it in the shell without crash or hang.
